summary: Iteration 5 — WS Partner workspace overhaul. Backend 68 effective passes (10 NEW checklist-template tests + 58 regression in cloudtax_api/route_order/admin_overhaul) — _checklist_from_template async refactor verified; no missed awaits. Frontend: WS Partner login → /ws/dashboard → 'Partner workspace' pill present → click onboarding card → /ws/onboarding/{eid} renders with Save changes (top-right gray), avatar+name+badges, 2-col layout (Client info + Engagement | Pre-filing checklist + Submission details), Tax situation/Notes (full-width bottom). Pre-filing checklist toggle persists via PATCH /api/engagements/{eid}/pre-filing-checklist (200). Gear icon opens ChecklistSettingsModal with rows + add input (works). WS Advisor field shows current user name disabled. Save notes → PATCH /api/engagements/{eid}/onboarding (200). CPA login shows 'CPA workspace' pill; CLIENT login has no pill (correct).

issues: All 5 columns (Referred/Intake/In prep/Review/Filed) show '0' and 'No clients' even though backend GET /api/engagements returns 17 engagements with proper statuses (REFERRED/IN_PREP/IN_REVIEW/FILED). This may be a pre-existing regression unrelated to iteration 5 — engagement.client_name is None in the API response, and the kanban likely skips engagements without client name. Confirm whether AdminDashboard hydrates client name client-side via a join.

Modal renders 0 rows immediately upon opening because GET /api/partner/checklist-template completes asynchronously after first paint. Acceptable UX but a brief loading skeleton/spinner would prevent perceived emptiness. Items appear within ~300ms.

action_items: Investigate admin dashboard kanban showing 0 clients despite 17 engagements in API. Likely pre-existing (not from iteration 5 changes) but should be verified — check if client name hydration broke or if the /admin/dashboard frontend logic now requires a field that's missing.
Optional: add a brief loading state in ChecklistSettingsModal while GET /api/partner/checklist-template resolves (currently shows 0 rows for ~300ms).
critical_code_review_comments: _checklist_from_template is correctly async and properly awaited at server.py:679 inside POST /engagements/onboarding. No missed awaits.
PUT /partner/checklist-template correctly sanitizes: trims labels, drops empties, coerces optional to bool. Returns 400 if no items remain after sanitization — verified.
Existing engagements' pre_filing_checklist remains stable across template PUTs (only NEW engagements pick up new template) — by design, regression test green.
Role guard on GET/PUT /partner/checklist-template correctly restricts to WS_PARTNER+ADMIN; CPA & CLIENT receive 403.

ChecklistTemplateIn uses list[dict] which bypasses pydantic-level validation per item (label, optional). Sanitization in handler is the only defense — acceptable since input is admin-only, but a stricter ChecklistItemIn(BaseModel){label:str, optional:bool=False} would tighten validation.
server.py is now 1720 lines (up from 1700) — split into routers recommended (carry-over note from iter 4).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_checklist_template.py (NEW — 10 tests covering GET access matrix, PUT persistence/empty-400/CPA-403, onboarding-seeds-from-template default+updated+regression)

success_rate.backend: 100% (68 effective passes / 0 failed / 1 skipped — all NEW endpoints + full regression green)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on iteration-5-specific features (WS pill, onboarding detail layout, all data-testids present, checklist toggle PATCH 200, ChecklistSettingsModal opens+adds, WS Advisor disabled, Save notes PATCH 200, CPA pill, no pill for CLIENT, admin login works)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@cloudtax.ca / CloudTax2026! | CPA: pallavi@cloudtax.ca | WS: henry.ziegler@wealthsimple.com | Client: chen@example.com — all CloudTax2026!
seed_data_creation: Created 4 TEST_onboarding_<uuid>@example.com physicians with associated corporations and ONBOARDING engagements via POST /api/engagements/onboarding (3 in test_checklist_template.py + 1 leftover from default check). Modified the global checklist_template settings doc multiple times during PUT tests but the autouse _restore_default fixture restores the original 6 default items at end of each test class. Verified post-test that GET /api/partner/checklist-template returns the 6 default items.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 ships clean. New endpoints GET/PUT /api/partner/checklist-template work + onboarding correctly seeds from template. Existing engagements remain unchanged (by design). Test files: test_checklist_template.py (10 tests), test_cloudtax_api.py (43), test_route_order_retest.py (7), test_admin_overhaul.py (9). The lone observed concern is admin /admin/dashboard kanban displaying 0 clients in all 5 columns despite 17 engagements in DB — appears pre-existing, NOT introduced by iteration 5 (no kanban-related code touched), but worth main agent check. Workspace pill works for WS_PARTNER ('Partner workspace') and CPA ('CPA workspace'); correctly absent for CLIENT and Admin (admin sees neither pill — confirm spec intent).

admin_kanban_empty.bug: Admin /admin/dashboard kanban shows 0 in every column (Referred/Intake/In prep/Review/Filed) with 'No clients' even though GET /api/engagements (admin token) returns 17 engagements spanning REFERRED/IN_PREP/IN_REVIEW/FILED.
admin_kanban_empty.rca: API response engagement.client_name is None across all 17 records. AdminDashboard.js likely groups by status AND filters out engagements with null client_name OR expects a hydrated `client` object that the backend no longer returns. Could also be that the dashboard hits a different aggregated endpoint (e.g., /api/admin/clients) that's now broken. Need to inspect frontend network tab and AdminDashboard.js.
admin_kanban_empty.mitigation: Either (a) backend should hydrate client_name into engagement responses (join users on corporation.client_id), or (b) frontend should render engagements without client_name as 'Unknown client' instead of skipping. Recommend backend fix since iteration 4 testing showed clients populated — likely the join was inadvertently dropped.

mocked_apis.aws_ses: Sandbox — invite emails return invite_link in body.
mocked_apis.aws_s3: Presigned PUT URLs work; CORS upload not validated end-to-end.
mocked_apis.permissions_enforcement: Permission flags stored on user but NOT enforced server-side (Option C — UI-only).
